items.title: With NY on the verge of a title, a deepish dive on the 72-73 Knicks:
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt:
With NY on the verge of a title, a deepish dive on the 72-73 Knicks:
-Not well-remembered, even by Clyde
-Pearl after winning the title: "this shit's done, let's get room service"
-Reed was the fulcrum
-They almost blew it v BOS
-Who deserved Finals MVP?
hoopsanalyst.com/revisiting-t...

items.title: WNBA referees need to get together during the All-Star break and work through whatever it is that’s going on, because some of these calls are just absolutely horrendous. They swung the pendulum too far in the other direction compared to last season. Tighten it up.

items.body_excerpt: WNBA referees need to get together during the All-Star break and work through whatever it is that’s going on, because some of these calls are just absolutely horrendous. They swung the pendulum too far in the other direction compared to last season. Tighten it up.

It's gut check time for the Spurs.

sports.yahoo.com/nba/article/...

media.title: How the Knicks attacked (behind) Victor Wembanyama to put New York one win away from NBA title
media.description: The Knicks didn't just find their offense in the second half of Game 4, for large stretches, they actively looked for the Defensive Player of the Year to do so.

items.title: Caitlin Clark, patient. Holds her handle in the lane long enough to draw in the defense, then fires a perfect pass to a cutting Aliyah Boston. Ties the game at 81. 7:50 to decide this game.

items.body_excerpt: Caitlin Clark, patient. Holds her handle in the lane long enough to draw in the defense, then fires a perfect pass to a cutting Aliyah Boston. Ties the game at 81. 7:50 to decide this game.

items.title: Sky guard Sydney Taylor has erupted for 16 of her 25pts in the 3rd and has made 9 of 10 shots off the bench. Everything is going down. And she got a steal to end the quarter.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Sky guard Sydney Taylor has erupted for 16 of her 25pts in the 3rd and has made 9 of 10 shots off the bench. Everything is going down. And she got a steal to end the quarter.

Indiana trailing 79-72 after yielding a 39-point 3Q from Chicago.

items.title: Taylor finishes with 16 points in just the third quarter. She's scored four combined across her previous four games, though she did have 27 against Toronto earlier this season. She's at 25 right now.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Taylor finishes with 16 points in just the third quarter. She's scored four combined across her previous four games, though she did have 27 against Toronto earlier this season. She's at 25 right now.

Fever down 79-72 after three. Fever were ahead 35-16 at one point.
